title: Internet Safety Rules
subtitle: Safe Internet Use and Online Awareness
overview: Students learn basic Internet safety rules including avoiding pop-ups, asking adults for help, and staying safe while using online platforms.

gallery.caption: Ask an adult when unsure online

keyTopics: Ask an adult before downloading or opening unknown links
Do not chat with strangers online
safetyRules: Do not click on pop-up advertisements.
Ask parents or teachers before opening unknown websites.
Never share passwords or personal information.
Do not chat with strangers online.
Tell an adult if something online feels unsafe.

activity.title: Internet Safety Discussion
steps: Discuss why each rule is important

quiz.q: What should you do when a strange pop-up appears?
options: Ignore it and ask an adult
quiz.explanation: Always ask an adult before clicking unknown pop-ups.

quiz.q: Who should help if something online feels unsafe?
Should you chat with strangers online?
